name: foodtrack
description: Orquestrador — roda frontend e backend juntos

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "FRONT,BACK" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.start: concurrently --names "FRONT,BACK" --prefix-colors "cyan,yellow" "npm run preview --prefix frontend" "npm run start --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
